reviews.review_description: The game was fun to begin with but as you progressed it lost its mystery in favor of more and more difficult puzzles.

So when I saw the low review I thought it was nothing and when I start to play I still thought it was a good game but then I got to last part of the game and then it all crash down

So the story is interesting the way how they show it but still there is confusion in my opinion but I still think it's great twist

The music and voice acting are pretty good I enjoyed the the girl acting in the music is very nice

But now the bad the puzzles which the main course of the game started good like you could complete it without prior knowledge just by sitting and thinking but later they were more than few puzzles that you either had proper knowledge before or my sheer dumb luck 

In the secret ending was very much disappointment for me and to get it you need to replace some of the most annoying puzzles and sit and watch it repeat this animation

I loved it but I cannot recommend it I still feel it had a good game some visuals are low but I can forgive it but sadly I won't recommend it maybe if there's a heavy discount but other than that sorry but no it has potential but it missed it by a mile
I really enjoyed this game. Have played it a few times now as you can go different routes. I like the darkness and the puzzles are fun to challenging.

This game had such potential, yet it’s all squandered on poor design choices.

Every interaction is painfully slow and tedious. So much repetition, it’s unforgivable. When puzzles become more difficult, you may need to experiment before you figure it out: well, get ready to repeat your actions in the slowest pissible manner over and over again.

Nodding mechanic is an abomination. It does not work well and often does not detect my nods. What’s worse, I don’t even need to double check my input, just do it already!

The girl’s voice is annoying high-pitched screecing hell. She will not shut her mouth and will repeat the samw phrases over and over again as you try to solve the puzzles.

The story made no sense, since they did not bother to translate the voice from Japanese. No subtitles either.

Some puzzles you have to solve twice in order to complete the game, and it’s as exciting as stubbing your toe.

I almost finished the game, but I couldn’t punish myself any longer. What a royal waste of time time.
The girl doesn't recognise my headmovements, which are essential to the game,.

It a shame there wasn’t more puzzles, I completed it in no time , the vase of flowers is misleading as I thought I had more puzzles then there was , but I actually enjoyed failing a puzzle just to see our fate , overall I did enjoy this short and sweet game I would purchase more like this but probably not at full price
Vary good game it worth the price but it was easy and short game you can complete it within one hour
The atmosphere and music is very immersive but the resolution is too low to get fully into it. Can you do a performance upgrade patch for quest 3 please
most boring game ever .Waited over 30 min to go to next level. total boring, time waster. give me my refund.

developer_response.body: Thank you Mary2892283811, such feedbacks motivates us a lot and encourages our team to work hard and improve day by day.

reviews.review_description: So basically the game is about you being strapped to a wheel chair and you have to guide a little girl to solve puzzles and if you fail the girl dies and then you die, and there are many endings to this game. I tried to request a refund because I didn’t like the game but it was not approved and I don’t know why but it makes me mad because I don’t want the game anymore.

reviews.review_title: Good game, but a little repetitive.
reviews.review_description: Fun game with good puzzles, but I feel it's a bit repetitive. Over all, I'd say it's worth a go if you enjoy puzzle games with a little horror mixed in.

Interesting concept to get around having to design a truly interactive environment.  Restrict all movement and have a laser pointer with head nods.  As far as I have found there is no story or background, or anything to build tension or engagement with the girl you are working with.   The rooms don't appear to have any continuity unless I'm missing the "big reveal" at the end.  Got stuck on a puzzle where you have to time laser pointer clicks pretty precise and I felt like I was playing the offline dinosaur game on g**gle.  Not even a issue of being frustrated, just bored. 
 Very happy that the positive reviewers enjoyed the experience but I feel there should have been at least 20 minutes of development on a story.  Unable to recommend unless it is on a $1.99 sale.
Too violent for me.  I don’t like deaths of children….not even animated!!

reviews.review_title: I wish I could love this but...
reviews.review_description: There is a lot to say about...."The Last Labyrinth". There's a lot of love and labor into this experience and its' premise, first impression wise, it drives the point home of its' unique nature, but once you find out how long it is due to the end game requiring repeating certain things start to grate you. For instance, your AI companion constantly gets in the way of your pointer and blocks everything that you are trying to click, sometimes making you misclick on something. Even if you get through that, the repeated puzzles are very annoying with no indication on how to complete them. And if you manage to get past all that, the ending itself is very very underwhelming. I don't understand how this story was presented to the team and they thought it was a cohesive and thought-provoking story. If you want to play something with a very organized narrative structure I recommend Tokyo Chronos. Try not to touch this game unless it goes on super sale.

reviews.review_title: For the price it's a waste of money
reviews.review_description: A short rather silly game I wish I hadn't wasted my money on. It's not nearly as fun as Moss, Down the Rabbit Hole or Ghost Giant.

reviews.review_title: i got this because it a puzzel game
reviews.review_description: this game is a good-ish puzzle game and doesn't make you dizzy by moving about
the game play throughout the puzzles are slow, and the puzzles aren't teally that tough. I was very disappointed when they wouldn't refund my money.

reviews.review_title: A little scary but lots of fun.
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. The fact that you just have to move your head to make the little girl do what you want is unbelievable. Please make more games like this one

This game has a good variety of brain teasers and when you get them first try, you feel like a genius. I am already past the first part of the game and it has a lot of twist and turns where you feel like as the puzzle starts to make you doubt your answer.

The game is basically full of death traps that require a variety of problem solving tactics, attention to detail, and foresight. This game is honestly, pretty horrifying. Knowing that your life and a young girl's life is at stake.

Also, spoiler warning, the girl is speaking Japanese. Who knew?

Some good puzzles. Others not so great. Lots of cut scenes and repetition that you can't skip over. Not entirely clear when the game is really over. You have to replay puzzles over again to get back to forks in the road to get to New puzzles - which is just terrible for a number of reasons. It's a reasonable game with 5+ hours of mostly enjoyable puzzles, but I probably wouldn't play a sequel.
